reasons: VIX regime stable — good for weekly holds
Macro data inline with expectations — less directional clarity

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (7.75) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 1.2% move to $390.25 (weekly expected move: 4.8%).

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (6.10) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires 1.1% move to $271.10 (weekly expected move: 5.9%).
